message:
fix: address Auto-QA issues for refresh animation, error handling (#4100)

- Tie RefreshCw animate-spin to isLoading state in YAMLDrillDown and
  EventsDrillDown retry buttons so users see loading feedback (#3905)
- Add animate-spin and disabled state to OperatorStatus retry button
  tied to isRefreshing (#3905)
- Add toast notification on deploy failure in Deploy.tsx so users see
  the error immediately instead of only via card events (#3913)

Many other findings in #3905, #3907, and #3913 were verified as false
positives from the static analysis tool (status icons flagged as refresh
buttons, valid inline HTML flagged as DOM nesting violations, graceful
degradation flagged as silent failures).

Closes #3905, closes #3907, closes #3913

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch: @@ -169,7 +169,7 @@ export function EventsDrillDown({ data }: Props) { onClick={() => refetch?.()} className="flex items-center gap-2 px-4 py-2 rounded-lg bg-card border border-border text-sm hover:bg-card/80 transition-colors" > - + Retry
